title: Hybrid Retrieval, Score Calibration, and Rank Fusion · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs hybrid retrieval, score calibration, and rank fusion from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Identify query slices where exact lexical and semantic dense signals complement or conflict instead of assuming hybrid superiority.
Avoid direct raw-score comparison across retrievers unless distributions and meaning are calibrated on target judgments.
Implement reciprocal rank fusion with stable identities, rank constant, duplicate handling, missing candidates, and deterministic ties.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review RAG engineering team handles case 9413 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to fuse lexical and dense candidates without comparing uncalibrated raw scores; retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define behavior when one retriever, model, index, language analyzer, or filter path fails or becomes stale.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Returning the remaining retriever silently is always safe degradation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define behavior when one retriever, model, index, language analyzer, or filter path fails or becomes stale. Artifact under review: hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation record says hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof. This does not satisfy Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation for hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator.

steps.why: Retrieving Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation through the concrete hybrid retrieval and fusion evaluator case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation, keep Rag Hybrid Fallback Degradation connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define behavior when one retriever, model, index, language analyzer, or filter path fails or becomes stale.
